full_text:
Lu Kai (Jingfeng) 陸凱 (敬風)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Kai (陸凱), styledJingfeng (敬風). Together with Wan Yu, shared the responsibility of Prime Minister under Sun Hao. Lu Kai was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Kai lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
